rulings.Case Title: *** TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY *** IN THE MATTER OF THE SAMUEL J.N. WOHL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #11, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Court to determine whether the attorney and paralegal hourly rates should be approved. 2) Order granting the 10th accounting required that $730.62 overpayment of trustee's fees be applied to the trustee's fees for this accounting period, which does not appear to have been applied. 3) Court to determine whether the requested new mutual funds should be authorized. 4) Petitioner requests replacement of trustee and change of venue to San Mateo County. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF MARION HALL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. ISSUES: 1. The proof of service of the amendment, which was filed on 10/10/23, does not have a copy of the instructions for how to appear remotely attached to the Notice. Does the Court wish to waive incomplete notice, given that these parties have appeared numerous times already? 2. The Court to determine if sanctions should be ordered. (Conservator states that Rachell Evans and her husband do not pay their one-half of the costs associated with the home that is a trust asset. Their share of such costs should be accounted for as a receivable either in this estate, since the conservatee is apparently paying all such real property costs, or in the trust.) Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM COLE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/26/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) No proof of service has been filed. [CRC 7.53(a).] (Notice must include the language regarding remote appearance procedures. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.]) (2) No proof of publication of notice has been filed. [CRC 7.53(a).] (3) No waivers of bond are attached as alleged in item 3e(3) of the amended petition. (4) Item 8 of the amended petition does not show the relationship of each person listed. (5) A domestic partner does not have priority for appointment before a child of the decedent's. (6) No corrected Acknowledgment of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities has been filed yet with all of the information required in item 2. Deadline for filing responsive papers is 12/15/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ANITA AGHI
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. (Letters of Administration, not Testamentary, were issued to the administrator. Courtesy copies are file stamped, single-sided, hard copies. Transferring assets to another account are not changes in the form of assets; reinvested dividends would be reportable changes if an accounting were presented. The market value of securities does not need to be set forth, as only the number of shares is relevant (market values fluctuate).)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES G. P. COLLINS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/26/23. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: 1. No proof of service of the complete Notice (with the language regarding remote appearance procedures attached) has been filed, showing that at least 15 days' notice of this hearing was given to all interested parties. 2. When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestor through whom they take (or would have taken) shall be named and his or her date of death and relationship to the decedent shall be stated. [LRSF 14.18 C.] The petitioner must set forth in a supplement to his petition the identities of the decedent's parents and their dates of death. If they are not deceased, they must receive notice. Deadline for filing the supplement to the petition, signed and verified by the petitioner (not the attorney), and the proof of service of complete notice of the 12/26/23 hearing is 12/15/23. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. A proposed personal representative must sign and verify his own pleadings, including any supplement or amendment thereto. [CRC 7.103(c).]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KENYATTA O. SCOTT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/02/2024 (no earlier date available), as the following issues (e-mailed to petitioner in pro per on 10/24/2023) remain unaddressed: 1) No DE-147S form is on file. A pleading cover sheet must be attached to this form. 2) No DE-121 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 3) No proof of publication is on file. 4) Item 2a of the petition must be unchecked, if the decedent died intestate. 5) Item 2b(3) must be checked, if the decedent died intestate. 6) Item 2d: At least one box must be checked. 7) Item 3d: i) Please provide a brief description of personal property. ii) If the estimated value of personal property does not exceed $184,500, please explain why the heirs are not proceeding with the small estate affidavit nonprobate procedure under Probate Code sections 13100 et seq. 8) Item 3e(4) must be unchecked, as it does not apply to the petitioner. If all other heirs waived the petitioner's bond, item 3e(3) must be checked, and DE-142 forms (bond waivers) signed by the heirs (other than the petitioner) must be filed. 9) Item 3g(2)(a) must be checked, if the decedent died intestate. 10) Item 3g(2)(c) must be checked, with the petitioner's relationship to the decedent specified. 11) Item 5a(3) or (4) must be checked. 12) Item 5a(7) or (8) must be checked. 13) Item 6b must be checked, if the decedent was survived by siblings. 14) Item 9: There were no attachments (4 pages) to the petition. 15) Please provide the names and dates of death of the decedent's parents. 16) A declaration required by LRSF 14.16(F) must be filed to state the total amount of anticipated liabilities of the decedent and claims against the estate and describe such liabilities and claims. A minimum bond ($20,000) is required for a personal representative who does not reside in California, regardless of bond waivers and absence of any liabilities or claims.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MILTON DEA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/02/2024 (no earlier date available), as the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 10/24/2023) remain unaddressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) No DE-147 form is on file. 3) No DE-147S form is on file. This form must be filed confidentially and conventionally with a pleading cover sheet attached (cannot be e-filed or attached to any e-filed document). 4) No DE-121 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 5) No proof of publication is on file. 6) The petition caption: The IAEA box must be checked. 7) Item 2a must be unchecked, if the decedent died intestate. 8) Item 3a: The decedent died more than 4 years ago. Please briefly explain why the petitioner delayed opening this probate. 9) Item 3e(3): No bond waiver (DE-142 form) signed by the decedent's sister is on file. Item 4 of the DE-142 form must specify the petitioner's name. 10) Item 3g(1)(c) must be unchecked, if the decedent died intestate. 11) Item 3h(3) must be checked. 12) Item 5a(3) or (4) must be checked. 13) Item 5a(7) or (8) must be checked. 14) Item 8: Please provide the names and dates of death of the decedent's parents.
